Project state and trade-offs

The project is currently green. Schedule is on track. Budget is within plan. Scope is being delivered as agreed. Quality remains high.

A few items to note: there has been some additional work on POS integration which the team is handling. The data-residency issue has been resolved by the architect. Authentication is in place.

The sponsor is pleased with the progress. The team is performing well.

We will continue to monitor and report any changes.
